name: Sada Naan
recipeInstructions:
------------------
VARIATION: BADAMI NAAN
1. Mix yeast and sugar with hot milk or water, cover, and let sit for 20 minutes.
2. Sift flour into a large bowl and make a well in the center.
3. Add yogurt to the yeast mixture.
4. Knead dough until smooth, cover, and let rise for 3-4 hours in a warm place.
5. Punch down dough, divide into 8 balls, and let rest for 10 minutes.
6. Roll each ball into triangles or round disks, then shape one side into teardrops.
7. Mix 1 tsp ghee (or butter), poppy seeds, and sesame seeds.
8. Spread mixture on each naan.
9. Place naans on a baking tray.
10. Bake in preheated oven (375°F/190°C/gas mark 5) for 4-5 minutes until brown spots appear.
11. If needed, place under preheated grill for 1-2 minutes to achieve desired browning.
12. Brush each sada naan with oil or butter before baking.
13. Sprinkle almonds and white sesame seeds on the greased side of every naan.
14. Bake in a preheated oven for 4-5 minutes.
